since_last: 43% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.98%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.24% · BTC +0.79% · Gold -0.13% · Nasdaq100 -0.49%. 43% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.98%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.98%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.07%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +27.47%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +27.47%, BABA +5.75%, AAPL +3.82%, ISRG +3.31%, GOOGL +3.29%. Laggards: DELL -12.07%, MU -7.94%, ANET -6.63%, AMBA -6.26%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.28% at $136.46
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.28% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
